docs.title: 📚 My Text Archive
docs.text: Welcome to my digital dump. This site contains my research, notes, and text files, all organized for easy access.

docs.title: 🔍 How to find things
docs.text:
• Search: Use the search bar at the top (press f or / on your keyboard) to search every word in every file.
  • Sidebar: Use the menu on the left to browse by category/folder.
  • Dark Mode: Use the sun/moon icon in the top right to switch themes.

docs.title: 📂 Recent Additions
docs.text:
• Nothing — Short description of what this is.
  • File Name 2 — Another quick note.
